interactions.text: THE FOUNDER'S ADDITION — front page, ten years old. A dying Edmund Vale legally reopens the capsule for one hour and places a single green-wax-sealed envelope inside: his final wishes, to be read at the 50th. The whole district watched him seal it back.
The Addition coverage, re-filed where it belongs. Archie's byline sits three columns over, reviewing a soup competition with tremendous seriousness.

detail.text: Preserved as he left it: blotter, pencil cup, a drawer with a lock even Ida couldn't sweet-talk. He was smiling when he asked for it, she says. Gary doesn't open drawers that were closed with a smile. Not yet.

Fifty years of front pages, edge to edge — except one conspicuous gap, fifty years back. The bound volume for that week is simply absent from the shelf. Dot, if asked: 'Before my time. Ask the shelf.'
